special_mechanics.name: Arwing Flight Controls
special_mechanics.description: Direct piloting controls for the Arwing ship during action sequences. Similar to original Star Fox flight mechanics with 3D movement within constrained rails.

special_mechanics.name: Semi-Real-Time Strategy Movement
special_mechanics.description: Ships move freely around a 2D map screen representing the Lylat system. Time moves at different paces between map screen (paused during selection) and action screen (slower pace during combat).

special_mechanics.name: Team Swapping Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Two pilots can be swapped at any moment. Each has independent shield gauge and energy system.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Star Fox 2 is a rail shooter with semi-real-time strategy elements, not a traditional platformer. Movement physics are contextual (map screen vs. action screen) and not documented with precise numerical parameters in available sources. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no specific physics values.
